title: Roasted Braised Mexican Garlic Grilled Elote Form
description: Funky, shaggy, nostalgic Mexican (Oaxacan) dish featuring minced garlic, braise, ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly, form=elote, vessel=cazuela. Grilled and served with lime and cotija cheese.
instructions: In a large cazuela or Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add 2 cloves of minced garlic and saut9 until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a simmer.
Add the elote corn, cover, and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 20 minutes, then braise for an additional 15 minutes, or until the corn is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
Grill the corn over medium heat, turning frequently, until slightly charred and tender.
Serve hot with lime wedges and crumbled cotija cheese
